name: notetaker_not_admitted_13
description: Notification that a meeting notetaker failed to join a named meeting

input.subject: Your notetaker bot wasn't admitted to your meeting
input.snippet: Your notetaker tried to join Open House but wasn't admitted.
input.body_text:
Hi,

Your notetaker bot tried to join “Open House: 1000 Example Avenue” but wasn't admitted.

You can still capture future meetings with the desktop app, which records directly from your device.

This message does not provide a date or time for the referenced meeting.

notes: Production regression: a named meeting without an explicit date must not be invented
